data.content: Implementation review approved. Commit 9c664af3 removes all OpenRouter code (4084 deletions) across 39 files including settings-openrouter-section.tsx, openrouter.ts, openrouter-session-runtime.ts, keychain.ts, and all related tests. No OpenRouter references remain in src/. Changes pushed to origin/main. Quality gates confirmed passing: tsc clean, 0 lint errors, 1855 tests passing, build succeeds.
